text.title: Strategy Methods Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real applications of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: SWOT chosen by default regardless of context.
antipattern.root-cause: Author has no method experience beyond SWOT.
antipattern.fix: Require fit scores per candidate; reject SWOT when other methods score higher.

antipattern.root-cause: Author treats method choice as one-shot.

antipattern.symptom: Fit scores are integers without supporting evidence.
antipattern.fix: Require rationale ≥30 chars per score axis.
